items.name: easy_dataset_pro
items.description: Easy Dataset Pro turns raw documents into high-quality LLM fine-tuning data. It parses PDFs/DOCXs via OCR, filters and compresses content, then builds a knowledge graph of entities and relationships. From this structured foundation, it generates self-contained Q&A pairs and supports a graph-aware QA system for validation and interactive querying
